requirement: the README reflects what the CLI and spec actually provide

findings.observation: The common-commands table matches shipped commands verified via 'qualitymd --help': spec, init, lint, lint --fix, status --json, version --json, upgrade --check, <command> --help all exist.

The CLI is clearly marked 'an early work in progress', but its 'Today the binary ships' sentence lists only init/lint/spec/status and the evaluation surface, omitting version and upgrade, which do ship and appear in the table below it (internal understatement, not an overstatement).
The claim that the CLI 'can fail CI when ratings fall below your chosen bar' matches the verified build-report --fail-at-or-below gate.

rationale: Every command and capability shown matches what the CLI provides today, planned/WIP state is marked, and the project's key risk (overstating what exists) is avoided. Satisfies the requirement; held below outstanding by the minor prose/table mismatch on version/upgrade.
